title: Handoff Intent Envelope
description: Outer envelope for every cross-agent handoff. The orchestrator validates this then dispatches to the per-intent payload schema.

type.description: Tag for regex extraction from agent stdout.

source_agent.description: Slug of the emitting agent. Must match a file under agents/.

target_agent.description: Slug of the destination agent. Must be in ALLOWED_TARGETS (discovered from agents/).

event.description: Optional free-text context. Sanitized + wrapped in <agent-handoff> data frame before reaching target.
